content.en:
After entering the entrance of the cave, Ye Tian entered another world.

As soon as he came in, Ye Tian was shocked.

"This is the Void Spirit Dao Golden Fruit!"

"This is the Immortal True Crystal Vine!"

......

Ye Tian saw a piece of treasures that could not be found in the outside world at all, there were dozens of them in total, and they were divided in ~zi places.

This treasure land is not too big, but there are so many treasures that he even thinks that this is the back garden of a certain strong man.

The Void Spirit Dao Golden Fruit can enhance the eternal will, even if it is a huge improvement effect on the will of the eighth order, the immortal true crystal vine can refine the immortal true crystal liquid, which can refine the physical body, and make the physical body to a higher level on the original basis, which can only be used once in a lifetime.

There are many other treasures, all of which are of great use to him, and can enhance his will or body.

"It's a pity that such a treasure can only be visited once!"

Ye Tian sighed darkly.

But for the Eternal Master, these resources are precious, but they don't drive them crazy.

Immediately, Ye Tian took these resources one by one, and then searched here for a long time, confirmed that there was no other opportunity, and left here.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian came out of this treasure land and appeared at the entrance of the cave.

Seeing that Ye Tian came out so quickly, the Demon Mountain controller asked curiously, "Little friend, how is the harvest?"

Ye Tian smiled: "It's not bad, I have obtained some resources." "

"The land of resources, it's okay. "

The Demon Mountain Master nodded slightly.

Immediately, Ye Tian said goodbye to the master of the Demon Mountain.

And the master of the Demon Mountain did not leave Ye Tian as a guest, and directly let Ye Tian leave.

Not long after, Ye Tian's replica body returned to the Blue Lotus Giant City, and immediately began to refine those resources.

If he completes refining these resources, there is still hope that his strength will improve again.

First, he refined those Demon Ancient Flowers.

These Demon Ancient Flowers also helped him improve his will, although the effect was not too good, but at least there were a large number of them, and it was prioritized for refining it.

Under Ye Tian's refining, the Demon Ancient Flowers turned into special energy to refine his eighth-order eternal will.

As time passed, Ye Tian's eternal will improved little by little.

A long time had passed, and these Demon Ancient Flowers had finally been refined by Ye Tian, but he was still a long way from the mid-eighth order will.

So, Ye Tian began to refine the resources from that resource treasure land to improve his will.

He put the Void Spirit Dao Golden Fruit at the end, this treasure had the best effect, so he left it at the end to refine.

Before you know it, another boundary river year has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had refined all the resources that could enhance his will except for the Void Spirit Dao Golden Fruit, and his will had already been raised to the peak level of the early eighth order, and he was only one step away from stepping into the middle of the eighth order will realm.

Thereupon.

He took out the Void Spirit Dao Golden Fruit and swallowed it in one gulp.

Rumble!!!

Huge energy poured into the will, frantically refining the eighth-order eternal will.

Under this crazy tempering, the shackles of Ye Tian's eighth-order will were gradually shattered.

A certain moment.

Click!

The shackles are broken!

Ye Tian's Eternal Will was promoted from the early stage of the Eighth Order to the middle of the Eighth Order, don't underestimate this improvement, the toughness of the Eternal Will has increased by at least several times, and the amount has also increased several times.

It can be said that with the breakthrough of the Eternal Will, Ye Tian's strength has increased a lot.

Next, Ye Tian refined all those resources that could refine the physical body, and the physical body became even stronger.

In this way, Ye Tian's strength naturally skyrocketed.

With his current strength, I'm afraid it is enough to be compared to the half-step Eternal Master who controls ninety percent of the supreme legendary body.

"There are almost only a few treasure lands that the Half-Tooth Master has suggested for me to go, so let's retreat here and control my Supreme Legendary Body with peace of mind. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Next, Ye Tian underwent a long period of penance.

Before I knew it, 100,000 realm river years had passed.

After such a long time, Ye Tian finally controlled seventy percent of the supreme legendary body, and his strength was truly invincible among the half-step eternal masters, unless it was a half-step eternal master who controlled ten percent of the supreme legendary body, there was no hope of competing with him.

After all, once you control ten percent of the Supreme Legendary Body, the body transforms and condenses the Supreme Control Body, and the strength is afraid to be very strong.

But he had never seen such a half-step Eternal Master, so he didn't know what his combat power was, so he couldn't judge and compare.

In these 100,000 Realm River years, Ye Tian has not only increased his strength, but also copied many control-level ancestors.

Moreover, he has many ways to control.

When he entered the Boundary River, he had only controlled three hundred paths, but now he had already controlled eight hundred paths, and he was not far from controlling a thousand paths.

The more Dao you control, the deeper the accumulation, the stronger the foundation, and it will help to impact the eternal master.

Therefore, Ye Tian has never given up on contemplating these Dao, and naturally the more contemplation, the better.

After Ye Tian controlled seventy percent of the supreme legendary body, his progress became slower and slower.

He knew very well that this was a mastery-level flesh body ancestor that would not help him to control the supreme legendary body too much.

After all, the Mastery-level Flesh Body Ancestor is just a talent, not a talent born specifically to control the Supreme Legendary Body, so it can only be said that it just happens to have such help.

Therefore, if Ye Tian wanted to further control his Supreme Legendary Body, he could only seek other opportunities, or endless years of penance.

......... ，......... ，

Originally, Ye Tian was ready to continue his penance for a long time.

However, on this day, the white-bearded old man came to visit Ye Tian.

Void Zone.

Source Sea.

The white-bearded old man came here, and Ye Tian greeted the white-bearded old man.

"The white-bearded old man, I am afraid that there is something important to visit in person. "

Ye Tian said.

Although in Qinglian Giant City, the two can also meet, but it is far less safe than in the Void Zone.

There are some things, if they are discussed in the Blue Lotus Giant City, maybe any of the Eternal Masters who are interested will take a peek or two.

And there is no eternal master in the Void Zone, so you don't need to think too much about speaking.

This is also the reason why the white-bearded old man is looking for Ye Tian in the void area.

"Endless Lord, there is a great opportunity, and I want to ask you for help. "

The white-bearded old man said seriously.

"What chance?" Ye Tian was surprised, the white-bearded old man had never been so serious, indicating that the opportunity was not simple.

So, he hurriedly asked, "Old man with white beard, don't you know a few eternal masters, and the relationship is still very good, why don't you look for them and come to me instead?"

The white-bearded old man explained, "That place, the Eternal Masters can't enter, but the half-step Eternal Masters can. I don't trust the other Eternal Masters, and if they're weak, they won't help me, but you can. In my opinion, your current strength is probably invincible among the half-step Eternal Masters. So, you're the right fit. "

Ye Tian didn't agree immediately, but said: "Old man with white beard, let's talk about where to go first, what is the chance, and then I can cooperate with you." "_
